title: ananas sativus var. viridis
intro: Ananas sativus var. viridis, commonly known as the green pineapple plant, is a variety of the pineapple plant that has not yet flowered and therefore does not produce edible fruit. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ananas sativus var. viridis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
